mapper.select: symbol, price, open_price AS openPrice, high_price AS highPrice, low_price AS lowPrice, volume, issuer, description, annual_div AS annualDiv, div_yield AS divYield, div_count AS divCount, updated_at AS updatedAt, created_at AS createdAt FROM etf_info WHERE symbol = #{symbol}

SELECT symbol, price, open_price AS openPrice, high_price AS highPrice, low_price AS lowPrice, volume, issuer, description, annual_div AS annualDiv, div_yield AS divYield, div_count AS divCount, updated_at AS updatedAt, created_at AS createdAt FROM etf_info ORDER BY div_yield DESC
